steps.title: Use the difference clue
steps.content: The colon explains the blank: guiro sounds can differ based on ridge distance, stroke type, and gourd thickness. The needed word must mean changeable across conditions.

steps.title: Rule out mismatches
steps.content: Choice A means unnoticed. Choice B means strong or effective, but the text is about differences in sound. Choice C means usual or unvarying, which is the opposite of can differ. The answer is D.
